creator: chris@encryptica.demon.co.uk
text:
During an attempted upgrade of courier the portupgrade fails with the
following during the part that tries to install vpopmail.

gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26'
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26'
/bin/mkdir -p /usr/local/vpopmail/etc
if [ -e "/usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vcfg/tcp.smtp" ]; then  install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vcfg/tcp.smtp /usr/local/vpopmail/etc/tcp.smtp-dist;  else  /usr/bin/touch /usr/local/vpopmail/etc/tcp.smtp-dist;  fi;
if [ ! -f /usr/local/vpopmail/etc/tcp.smtp ]; then  install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /usr/local/vpopmail/etc/tcp.smtp-dist /usr/local/vpopmail/etc/tcp.smtp;  fi
if [ ! -f /usr/local/vpopmail/etc/vlimits.default ]; then  install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /usr/local/vpopmail/etc/vlimits.default-dist /usr/local/vpopmail/etc/vlimits.default;  fi
/usr/bin/touch /usr/local/vpopmail/etc/defaultdomain
/usr/sbin/chown -R vpopmail:vchkpw /usr/local/vpopmail/bin/ /usr/local/vpopmail/etc/
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README.activedirectory /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README.filelocking /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README.ipaliasdomains /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README.ldap /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README.maildrop /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README.mysql /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README.onchange /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README.oracle /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README.pgsql /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README.qmail-default /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README.quotas /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README.roamingusers /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README.spamassassin /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README.sybase /usr/ports/mail/vpopmai
 l/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README.vdelivermail /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README.vlimits /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README.vpopmaild /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README.vpopmaild /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/README.vqmaillocal /usr/ports/mail/vpopmail/work/vpopmail-5.4.26/UPGRADE /usr/local/vpopmail/doc/
install: wrong number or types of arguments
usage: install [-bCcpSsv] [-B suffix] [-f flags] [-g group] [-m mode]
               [-o owner] file1 file2
       install [-bCcpSsv] [-B suffix] [-f flags] [-g group] [-m mode]
               [-o owner] file1 ... fileN directory
       install -d [-v] [-g group] [-m mode] [-o owner] directory ...

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/courier-authlib-vchkpw.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/courier-authlib-vchkpw.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/courier.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/courier.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/courier.
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portupgrade.2025.0 env UPGRADE_TOOL=portupgrade UPGRADE_PORT=courier-0.54.0 UPGRADE_PORT_VER=0.54.0 make
** Fix the problem and try again.
